title: ItemCard component for displaying item information with metadata and actions
purpose: Displays item information in a card format with type-specific icons, relative timestamps, and action buttons. Used in the sidebar to show diagrams, documents, designs, spreadsheets, and snippets.
module_context: Exports ItemCardProps interface and ItemCard component. Includes helper functions for formatting time, detecting language, and getting snippet metadata. Contains SVG icon components for different item types.

steps.content: Calculate the time difference between now and the provided timestamp in milliseconds.
Convert the time difference to minutes, hours, and days.
IF the difference is less than a minute, return 'just now'.
ELSE IF the difference is less than an hour, return the minutes ago.
ELSE IF the difference is less than a day, return the hours ago.
ELSE IF the difference is less than a week, return the days ago.
ELSE return the date formatted as a localized string.
Extract the file extension from the item name.
Map the file extension to a display language name using a predefined mapping.
IF no mapping is found, return 'Text' as the default language.
Parse the item content as JSON to extract code and language information.
IF the parsed content contains code, use it as the code source.
IF the parsed content contains a file path, detect the language from the file path.
IF the parsed content contains a language identifier, map it to a display name.
Count the number of lines in the code.
Calculate the size of the code in bytes.
Convert the byte size to a human-readable format with appropriate units.
Return a specific SVG icon component based on the item type.
IF the type is diagram, return the diagram icon.
ELSE IF the type is design, return the design icon.
ELSE IF the type is spreadsheet, return the spreadsheet icon.
ELSE IF the type is snippet, return the snippet icon.
ELSE IF the type is embed, return the embed icon.
ELSE IF the type is image, return the image icon.
ELSE return the default document icon.
Format the relative time from the item's last modified timestamp.
Calculate snippet metadata if the item is a snippet.
Render the card with appropriate styling based on selection state.
Display the item name with appropriate text styling.
IF the item is a snippet, display snippet-specific metadata.
Display the item type and relative time.
Render action buttons that appear on hover.
